commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR strips plaintext provider `apiKey` values from generated `models.json`, migrates eligible legacy keys into `auth-profiles.json`, preserves non-secret custom-provider markers, and adds focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. A legacy `models.json` with a plaintext provider key and no configured or implicit providers follows the existing empty-provider `skip` path before the PR’s migration block can run.
commands.review_followup: A narrow repair is available: move or extend migration and stripping so catalog-only existing providers are handled before `skip`/`noop`, with focused regression coverage.

target.title: fix(agents): strip plaintext model provider keys
target.author: pcdqc

commands.reason: author association CONTRIBUTOR and repository permission none are not allowed
